name: Download Count
description: Number of times the game has been downloaded across all platforms. Indicates popularity and reach.
sources: AppFigures, AppMagic, Apple App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

name: Gameplay Mechanics
description: How engaging, innovative, and polished the game's core mechanics are.
sources: Game reviews, Gaming blogs, Playthrough videos, User reviews, gameplay videos, user feedback

name: Genre
description: The game's genre and its popularity among mobile gamers.
sources: App store categories, Apple App Store, Google Play Store, game descriptions, market analysis

name: Genre diversity
description: The variety of gameplay experiences offered, including action, puzzle, strategy, and simulation. A diverse genre selection appeals to a broader audience.
sources: App Store, Game description, Google Play Store, PCMag, Pocket Tactics

name: Genre Popularity
description: How popular the game's genre is, based on download numbers and active players.

name: Graphics Quality
description: Visual fidelity and artistic style of the game.
sources: App Store descriptions, User reviews, app store descriptions, game reviews, gaming blogs

name: In-App Purchases
description: Presence and intrusiveness of in-app purchases.
sources: App Store Descriptions, Apple App Store, Game Reviews, Google Play Store, User Reviews

name: Monetization Model
description: How the game generates revenue (e.g., free-to-play with in-app purchases, paid).
sources: App Store descriptions, App store information, Apple App Store, Gaming blogs, Google Play Store, MiniReview, User reviews, game industry reports, user reviews

name: Number of Downloads
description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
sources: 3rd party app analytics providers, AppMagic, Appfigures, Apple App Store, Appmagic, Business of Apps, Google Play Store, Udonis Blog

name: User Rating
description: Average rating given by users on app stores.
sources: Apple App Store, Google Play Store, TapTap

name: User Ratings
description: Average rating given by users in app stores.
sources: App Store, Apple App Store, Google Play Store
